title: teclea crenulata
intro: Teclea crenulata, also known as the Cagayan plum or Mayan plum, is a plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Teclea crenulata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves, bark, or fruit, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions and wounds.
